cards.back: A game where two players repeatedly play a prisoner's dilemma game, allowing them to adjust their strategy
A stable state where no player can improve their payoff by unilaterally changing their strategy
A mechanism that allows players to switch between different strategies or games in a repeated game
A repeated game where players can defect or cooperate, with the goal of maximizing their payoff
A strategy in repeated games where players cooperate on the first move and then mirror their opponent's previous move
